## Technical Details

**Generation Parameters:**
- Model: SDXL Base 1.0
- VAE: sdxl_vae.safetensors
- Sampler: euler
- Steps: 20-25
- CFG: 7.0
- Scheduler: normal

**Prompt Guidelines Followed:**
- Professional commercial photography style
- Clean backgrounds (white/soft gradient)
- No people/faces (adult products context)
- High quality aesthetic matching Venus brand
- Brand colors: rose, purple, elegant neutrals
